name: rtl-impl
description: RTL implementation: spec read → header → FF blocks → comb blocks → lint

tasks.detail: Extract: module name, parameters, port list (name/width/direction), clock/reset convention, functional requirements. Do not write any code yet.

tasks.content: Write module header (parameters and port declarations)
tasks.detail: module <name> #(params) (ports); All ports with explicit direction+type+width. Add `default_nettype none at top.
One always_ff per clock domain. Nonblocking (<=) only. All registers have reset. Pattern: if(!rst_n) q<=0; else q<=d;
Blocking (=) only. Default assignment at top of each block (no latches). Case statements with default.
Run /lint <module>.sv. Fix all errors. Warnings: fix width mismatches; document others.
